meaning: n.盖拉族(北非埃塞俄比亚一族),盖拉语adj.盖拉族人[语]的
examples: The Galla tribe from Ethiopia used coffee, but not as a drink.
Objective To research Galla Chinensis antibacterial effect in vitro.
The blue of the ceiling of the mausoleum of Galla Placidia is unusually dark and deep almost inscrutably so.
The mausoleum of Galla Placidia, sister of Flavius Honorius, the very man who made Ravenna the capital of the Western Empire.
